Testimonials.title: What Families Say?

Testimonials.content1: Found amazing events for my daughter. Especially the online painting workshop was very enjoyable. Thanks to Bulbi, we discovered her talents!
Testimonials.content2: My son attended the coding workshop and was very happy. The platform is user-friendly, buying tickets is easy. Thanks Bulbi!
Testimonials.content3: I was looking for quality events. Bulbi has both educational and fun activities. Highly recommended!

AboutPage.heroTitle: Events for your child, right in your pocket!
AboutPage.heroDesc1: Bulbi is an innovative marketplace that brings together educational and fun events for children aged 0-12 under one roof.
AboutPage.heroDesc2: By listing online and in-person events, it enables businesses to reach wider audiences while making it possible for parents to quickly and easily find suitable activities for their children.
AboutPage.missionText1: Bulbi helps families evaluate appropriate developmental opportunities for their children by offering customized events based on their children's age, interests, and needs.
AboutPage.missionText2: The platform allows businesses to list their online and in-person events, enabling them to reach a wider audience. While online events transcend city limits, in-person events give children the opportunity to build strong bonds. Bulbi provides visibility for businesses while allowing parents to easily select suitable events for their children.
AboutPage.visionText: Bulbi aims to create a reliable and dynamic platform that meets the needs of parents. This platform brings together activities that contribute to children's learning processes and personal development. By offering easily accessible opportunities for every parent regardless of socioeconomic differences, it aims to make lasting and positive contributions to children's futures by blending traditional values with modern technology. By combining online and in-person events, it aims to create an educational and entertaining experience for children and establish a strong interaction network in society.
AboutPage.discoverSubtitle: Bulbi's three core components are: In-Person Events, Online Activities, and the Information Center supporting parents.
AboutPage.faceToFaceTitle: Discover Exciting In-Person Classes Near You
AboutPage.faceToFaceDesc1: Bulbi offers the opportunity to discover hundreds of events that will inspire your children, offer fun experiences, and allow them to explore their creative potential. Thanks to events you can always find near you, your child's physical and mental development are supported together while their social skills are strengthened.
AboutPage.faceToFaceDesc2: By ensuring you access all these events in a safe and supervised environment, Bulbi offers the perfect harmony of fun and learning. Join us for activities that will awaken your child's curiosity, increase their passion for learning, and lay the foundations for lifelong friendships!
AboutPage.onlineDesc: Bulbi offers a wide range of online classes that children can easily join. Through online events, children experience interactive and enjoyable learning at home, exploring activities they love anytime, anywhere.
AboutPage.blogDesc: By providing educational, informative, and entertaining content for parents and children, we aim to support children's development and guide families. You can gain a different perspective in our Information Center.

PrivacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicyPage.intro_1: This is the Privacy and Cookies Policy for the
PrivacyPolicyPage.intro_3: website. For the purposes of this policy, both the website and the mobile application will be collectively referred to as the “App”. The App is operated by
PrivacyPolicyPage.intro_4: , trading as Bulbi (“we”, “us”, “our”). We are the data controller responsible for processing your personal data.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s1_title: Information We May Collect From You
PrivacyPolicyPage.s1_desc: We may collect and process the following types of personal and non-personal data:
PrivacyPolicyPage.s1_items: Name, email address, phone number, and any other details provided via forms on the App (e.g., registration, event booking, feedback).||Login credentials such as username and password.||Your preferences to deliver personalized experiences and content.||Transactional information (e.g., purchases, event enrollments).||Communications sent to us (e.g., support, feedback, inquiries).||Survey responses (if any).||Device information: IP address, device ID, OS version, browser type, location data (approximate), language settings.||Social profile data (if you sign in via Google, Facebook, Apple, etc.).||Non-personally identifiable data (aggregated/anonymous usage data for analytics and improvement).
PrivacyPolicyPage.s1_note: You may choose not to share some of this data, but doing so may limit your access to certain App features.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s2_desc: We may use your information to:
PrivacyPolicyPage.s2_items: Personalize and improve your Bulbi experience.||Process and manage purchases and subscriptions.||Manage your account and activity history.||Communicate with you regarding services or support.||Analyze user behavior to enhance features and performance.||Protect against fraud and misuse.||Fulfill legal obligations if required.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s2_note: We may also use your information to send you updates or promotional offers via email or push notifications—but only with your consent. You may opt-out at any time.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s3_desc: The App may include community sections or public discussions. Any information shared there is public, so please avoid disclosing personal or sensitive data.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s4_desc: Bulbi may link to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices or content. We encourage you to review their privacy policies separately.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s5_desc: All payments made through Bulbi are processed securely by third-party payment providers. We do not store or access your credit/debit card details. Transactions are encrypted using industry-standard SSL (Secure Socket Layer) technology.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s6_desc: With your consent, we may send you emails or push notifications regarding:
PrivacyPolicyPage.s6_items: Upcoming Bulbi events||New features or offers||Relevant content based on your preferences
PrivacyPolicyPage.s6_note: You may unsubscribe or disable notifications at any time via settings or using the “unsubscribe” link in emails.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s7_desc: To offer location-based services or suggestions (e.g., nearby events or partners), Bulbi may request access to your device’s approximate location. You can manage this permission via your device settings.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s8_desc: We take data security seriously and implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data. However, internet-based transmissions are never completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s9_desc: Your data may be stored on secure servers hosted in Türkiye or abroad (e.g., EU/EEA regions), in compliance with applicable data protection laws. By using the App, you consent to this transfer, storage, and processing.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s10_desc: The Bulbi website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience. These may include:
PrivacyPolicyPage.s10_items: Session cookies: Temporary cookies used during your visit.||Persistent cookies: Remember preferences for future visits.||Analytics cookies: Collect anonymous data for performance analysis.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s10_note: You can control or disable cookies in your browser settings. However, disabling cookies may affect your experience. Some tracking tools may include pixel tags or GIFs used in email communication or in-app content to understand engagement.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s11_desc: We may share your data with:
PrivacyPolicyPage.s11_items: Service providers and contractors assisting with operations (e.g., hosting, analytics, payments).||Partners and merchants where necessary for event bookings or service delivery.||Legal authorities when required by law or for protection against misuse.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s11_note1: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s11_note2: In the event of a business restructuring or acquisition, your data may be transferred to the new entity, with continued adherence to this privacy policy.
PrivacyPolicyPage.s12_desc: If you would like us to delete your personal information or have any questions about data usage, please contact us at:
PrivacyPolicyPage.s13_desc: For any privacy-related questions, feedback, or data requests, you can reach us via:

HelpPage.title: Help Center
HelpPage.subtitle: How can we help you? You can find the information you need below.
HelpPage.faqDesc: Find answers to the most common questions from our users.
HelpPage.contactDesc: If you couldn't find your answer, contact our support team directly.
HelpPage.securityDesc: Learn how your data and payments are protected on our platform.
HelpPage.refundDesc: Get detailed information about ticket cancellations and refunds.

FaqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FaqPage.subtitle: Find answers to your questions here.
FaqPage.q1: How can I register on the platform?
FaqPage.a1: You can sign up for free in seconds using your Google account or email address by clicking the 'Register' button in the top right corner.
FaqPage.q2: Can I cancel a ticket I purchased?
FaqPage.a2: Cancellation conditions vary by event and organizer. For events that allow cancellation up to 48 or 24 hours before, you may receive a refund as a promo code. Please review our Cancellation & Refund Policy for details.
FaqPage.q3: How do I find events suitable for my child's age group?
FaqPage.a3: You can use the filtering options on the Events page to select your child's age range, interests, and location to list the most suitable events.
FaqPage.q4: Is it paid to become a partner?
FaqPage.a4: No, registering as a partner is free. A service fee is only deducted from sold tickets and online classes at rates determined in the agreement.
FaqPage.a5: Absolutely. Bulbi uses payment infrastructures compliant with international security standards (PCI-DSS). Your card details are not stored on our systems, and all transactions are encrypted with 256-bit SSL.

SecurityPage.title: Security Policy
SecurityPage.p1: At Bulbi, we prioritize the safety of both children and parents above all else. We take international standard measures to ensure the security of your data, payments, and event experience on our digital platform.
SecurityPage.p2: All ticket purchases and online class payments made through our platform are processed via licensed and trusted payment institutions. Your credit card information is never stored on our servers, and transactions are protected with 256-bit SSL encryption.
SecurityPage.p3: Your and your children's personal data are strictly protected in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK). Your data is secured against unauthorized access using industry-standard firewalls and advanced cybersecurity protocols.
SecurityPage.p4: All organizers and education providers wishing to list events or classes on the Bulbi platform undergo a detailed identity verification and approval process. Our goal is to ensure your children spend time in safe, educational, and supervised environments.

KariyerPage.heroSubtitle: At Bulbi, we touch the lives of children and families, making their world more colorful. Would you like to be a part of this story?
KariyerPage.whyBulbiSubtitle: We are not just a workplace, we are a passionate family.
KariyerPage.card1Desc: Children's development and family happiness are at the center of everything we do. We make a direct and positive impact on society.
KariyerPage.card2Desc: We are always open to new ideas. We have a work culture that supports initiative, flexibility, and nurtures creativity.
KariyerPage.card3Desc: You will have the opportunity to work shoulder to shoulder with an expert, fun, and constantly supportive team.
KariyerPage.applyDesc: We do not have any active open positions right now, but we are always open to meeting great talents! Share your resume with us, and we'll reach out to you first for future opportunities.
